## Type
- [ ] New feature spec (`specs/`)
- [ ] New / updated component doc (`design-system/components/`)

## Checklist
- [ ] Follows the house style (small, single-topic, frontmatter present)
- [ ] Used the relevant `_TEMPLATE.md` where applicable
- [ ] Foundations intact (RTL, Persian, Persian numerals, ﷼, Jalali, Yekan Bakh)
- [ ] Updated the relevant `_index.md`
- [ ] Ticked the box in `ROADMAP.md`
- [ ] Resolved `_(confirm)_` items include a source link
- [ ] No local config / secrets committed
